calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
Mitchell Wong, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2018 Continued To Feb-26-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2018 Continued To Nov-20-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Colby Dean LaVelle, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to NOV-20-2018 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
